item.title: FDA Extends Approval of PKU Drug to Include Adolescents
item.description: Previously only approved for adults, BioMarin’s pegvaliase-pqpz (PALYNZIQ) is now licensed for patients as young as 12 years. Medscape Medical News

item.title: Children With OSA Have Greater Risk for Flu and COVID
item.description: Surprisingly, adenotonsillectomy for obstructive sleep apnea did not reduce the risk. Medscape Medical News

item.title: Autonomic Dysfunction: A Hidden Driver of Gastroparesis?
item.description: Multimodal physiologic testing in patients with chronic gastroduodenal symptoms reveals autonomic dysfunction and links it to delayed gastric emptying...

item.title: Work Disability Risk Can Persist Years After TBI
item.description: Traumatic brain injury is linked to a persistently increased risk for work disability irrespective of the severity of the trauma, a new cohort study s...

item.title: Practical Answers to Everyday Infection Questions
item.description: Avoid unnecessary tests and antibiotics by applying evidence-based, cost-conscious infectious-disease decision-making, with practical guidance for com...
